name: Mirana
archetype: Moon priestess Paladin, guardian of sacred cycles
speech_patterns: References lunar phases and celestial events
Uses poetic metaphors about light and darkness
quirks: Keeps a journal of moon phases and their effects
Meditates facing the moon whenever possible
Gives blessings freely to those who ask
example_phrases: The moon waxes full tonight. A good omen for our journey.
As the tide rises and falls, so too must we flow with fate's currents.
I offer you moonlight's blessing, traveler. May it guide your path.
In darkness, we find the truest reflection of our inner light.
The new moon brings endings, but also new beginnings.
